item.name: Goobbue Ray
item.description:
While this wavekin has much in common with the goobbues from which it gained its name, perhaps most noticeable is the expression of gormless contentment permanently etched on its face.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: Most assume this manta was so named for its great width and distinctive coloring, but some choose to believe the rather more whimsical tale of its origin─that a pack of goobbues, wading in the shallows, grew so enamored of the ocean that they assumed forms which would let them frolic in the waves forevermore.
